title: Payment API complete outage
symptoms: All payment requests failing with HTTP 503. Error rate 100%.
root_cause: Database connection pool exhausted due to sudden traffic spike
resolution: Restarted PostgreSQL, increased pool size from 50 to 200. Added connection timeout 30s.

title: Search service CrashLoopBackOff
symptoms: Search pods restarting every 30 seconds. OOM errors in logs.
root_cause: Memory leak in query cache. Cache grew to 2GB and triggered OOM.
resolution: Rolled back deployment to v2.3.1. Set QUERY_CACHE_MAX_SIZE=512MB. Restarted pods.

title: Authentication service timeout
symptoms: Login failures. JWT validation taking >5s. Users unable to sign in.
root_cause: Redis connection pool exhausted. Max connections default 10 too low.
resolution: Restarted Redis cluster. Increased max connections to 50. Added connection retry logic.

title: Database primary node crash
symptoms: All write operations failing. Replication lag at 5 minutes.
root_cause: WAL disk full. Disk utilization reached 100%.
resolution: Cleared old WAL files. Ran pg_archivecleanup. Increased disk from 500GB to 1TB.

title: API gateway 504 errors
symptoms: All APIs timing out with 504 Gateway Timeout. Latency spikes to 30s.
root_cause: Upstream timeout 30s too low for batch operations.
resolution: Increased timeout to 120s. Added circuit breaker for slow endpoints.

title: Email service deliverability failure
symptoms: Transactional emails not sending. Spam score increased.
root_cause: SMTP rate limiting triggered. 10,000 emails sent in 5 minutes.
resolution: Implemented exponential backoff. Added email queue with batch size 100.

title: File upload service completely down
symptoms: Uploads failing with 413 Payload Too Large. Storage bucket full.
root_cause: S3 bucket reached 100GB limit. Auto-delete failed.
resolution: Increased bucket limit to 500GB. Fixed auto-delete cron job. Added storage monitoring.

title: Cache cluster split-brain
symptoms: Inconsistent cache data. Some users seeing old data.
root_cause: Network partition split Redis cluster into two partitions.
resolution: Forced failover. Ran redis-cli cluster failover. Migrated to sentinel.

title: SQL query timeout (slow queries)
symptoms: Dashboard loading >10s. Some reports timing out.
root_cause: Missing index on user_id column in orders table. Full table scan.
resolution: Created index idx_orders_user_id. Optimized query to use batch processing.

title: Memory leak in notification service
symptoms: Pods restart every 2 hours. Memory usage increasing steadily.
root_cause: Unclosed WebSocket connections. Connection pool not releasing.
resolution: Fixed connection cleanup. Added max connection lifetime. Restarted pods.

title: DNS resolution failures
symptoms: Intermittent 'unknown host' errors. Random services failing.
root_cause: CoreDNS pod crashed. Cache entries expired.
resolution: Restarted CoreDNS. Increased cache TTL to 300s. Added 3 replicas.

title: SSL certificate expiry warning
symptoms: SSL errors in logs. Some API calls failing.
root_cause: SSL certificate expiring in 3 days. No auto-renewal.
resolution: Issued new certificate. Installed cert-manager for auto-renewal.

title: Kafka consumer lag spike
symptoms: Events delayed by 30 minutes. Processing lag at 10,000 messages.
root_cause: Consumer group failed. One partition unassigned.
resolution: Rebalanced consumer group. Increased consumers to 6. Reduced batch size.

title: Elasticsearch cluster yellow status
symptoms: Search performance degraded. Partial results returned.
root_cause: One node died. Unassigned shards.
resolution: Added new node. Rerouted unassigned shards. Increased replica count.

title: Rate limiter saturation
symptoms: Users receiving 'Too Many Requests' (429) errors.
root_cause: Rate limit 60 req/min. Traffic at 100 req/min.
resolution: Increased limit to 150 req/min. Added client-side throttling.

title: GraphQL query performance degradation
symptoms: GraphQL queries taking 10-15s. Resolver performance issues.
root_cause: N+1 query problem in users resolver.
resolution: Used DataLoader to batch queries. Added MongoDB aggregation.

title: Log aggregation slow
symptoms: Logs appearing 5-10 minutes late in dashboard.
root_cause: Fluentd buffer full. Disk I/O bottleneck.
resolution: Increased buffer size. Added persistent volume. Upgraded to SSD.

title: Worker queue backlog
symptoms: Jobs delayed by 2 hours. Queue size at 50,000 jobs.
root_cause: Worker count too low. 2 workers for 50 jobs/min.
resolution: Scaled workers to 10. Added autoscaling. Optimized job processing.

title: MongoDB connection pool exhaustion
symptoms: Operations timing out. Connection errors in app logs.
root_cause: maxPoolSize set to 10. Connections at 10, all busy.
resolution: Increased maxPoolSize to 50. Added connection idle timeout.

title: OAuth token refresh failures
symptoms: Users logged out unexpectedly. Token validation errors.
root_cause: Refresh token expiration not handled properly.
resolution: Added token refresh retry logic. Extended expiry to 7 days.

title: Webhook delivery failures
symptoms: 30% webhooks failing. Retry mechanism overwhelmed.
root_cause: Destination server down. No circuit breaker.
resolution: Added retry with exponential backoff. Implemented dead letter queue.

title: Cron job failing silently
symptoms: Daily reports not generated. No error notifications.
root_cause: Cron job script error. No monitoring set up.
resolution: Fixed script. Added cron job monitoring. Added alerting on failure.

title: File permission errors
symptoms: Uploads failing with permission denied. Temp directory full.
root_cause: Temp directory full. Permission changed after update.
resolution: Cleared temp files. Fixed owner permissions. Added auto-cleanup.

title: Frontend build failures
symptoms: CI/CD pipeline failing. React build errors.
root_cause: Node memory limit too low. OOM during build.
resolution: Increased node memory to 4096MB. Added build caching.

title: Dependency vulnerability alert
symptoms: Security scan found 10 high-severity vulnerabilities.
root_cause: Outdated dependencies. No regular updates.
resolution: Updated all packages. Fixed breaking changes. Added Dependabot.

title: Staging environment out of sync
symptoms: Staging database mismatch. Test failures.
root_cause: DB migration applied to production but not staging.
resolution: Applied migration to staging. Synced schemas.

title: Pod not scheduling
symptoms: New pods pending. Insufficient resources.
root_cause: Node memory insufficient. 2 nodes at 95% memory.
resolution: Added new node. Evicted low-priority pods. Increased memory requests.

title: PersistentVolumeClaim stuck
symptoms: PVCs pending. Pods stuck in ContainerCreating.
root_cause: Storage class unavailable. CSI driver not installed.
resolution: Installed CSI driver. Created storage class. PVC bound successfully.

title: Ingress controller crashing
symptoms: Traffic not routing. 503 errors on all domains.
root_cause: NGINX Ingress pod OOM killed. Memory limit too low.
resolution: Increased memory limit to 512MB. Updated ingress controller.

title: Helm chart rollback failed
symptoms: Deployment stuck in CrashLoopBackOff after update.
root_cause: Invalid values.yaml in new chart. Missing required config.
resolution: Rolled back with 'helm rollback'. Fixed values.yaml. Re-applied.

title: AWS RDS multi-AZ failover
symptoms: Database connections interrupted. Read replica lag.
root_cause: Primary AZ failed. Automatic failover took 3 minutes.
resolution: Verified failover completed. Updated connection strings. Tested R/W.

title: GCP Compute Engine quota exceeded
symptoms: Unable to create new VMs. Scale-up failed.
root_cause: CPU quota limit reached. 100 cores used out of 100.
resolution: Requested quota increase. Terminated unused VMs. Added monitoring.

title: Azure AD token validation errors
symptoms: Users unable to authenticate. 'Invalid token' errors.
root_cause: Azure AD certificate rotated. App not updated.
resolution: Updated app registration. Added certificate rotation automation.

title: VPC subnet exhaustion
symptoms: Unable to create new pods. IP assignment failures.
root_cause: /16 subnet exhausted. 65,000 IPs used.
resolution: Created secondary CIDR block. Updated CNI config. Restarted nodes.

title: Firewall rule misconfiguration
symptoms: API calls failing. Connection timeout. Health checks failing.
root_cause: Firewall rule blocked port 443 from outside.
resolution: Updated security group. Added port 443 ingress rule.

title: VPN tunnel down
symptoms: Database access from app failing. VPN disconnected.
root_cause: ISP issue. VPN tunnel dropped. Auto-reconnect failed.
resolution: Manually reconnected VPN. Added health checks. Setup automatic restart.

title: Suspicious login attempts
symptoms: Multiple failed login attempts from unusual IPs.
root_cause: Credential stuffing attack. Brute force attempt.
resolution: Blocked IP range. Enabled MFA. Added rate limiting.

title: API key exposed in logs
symptoms: Security scan detected API keys in application logs.
root_cause: Logging configuration captured request headers with API keys.
resolution: Redacted sensitive data from logs. Rotated API keys. Added log sanitization.

title: Unpatched security vulnerability
symptoms: Security scan detected CVE-2024-1234 in nginx.
root_cause: Nginx version 1.20.0 vulnerable. Not updated.
resolution: Updated nginx to 1.25.0. Patched vulnerability. Verified.

title: Prometheus metric scraping failure
symptoms: No metrics in Grafana. Dashboards empty.
root_cause: Prometheus target down. ServiceMonitor misconfigured.
resolution: Fixed ServiceMonitor labels. Restarted Prometheus. Verified targets.

title: Grafana dashboard corruption
symptoms: Dashboards showing wrong data. Panel errors.
root_cause: Bad query in dashboard. Data source changed.
resolution: Updated data source URLs. Fixed queries. Restored from backup.

title: Logstash pipeline failure
symptoms: Logs not reaching Elasticsearch. Pipeline errors.
root_cause: Pipeline configuration syntax error after update.
resolution: Reverted pipeline config. Fixed syntax. Restarted Logstash.

title: Database transaction log full
symptoms: Writes failing. Replication stopped.
root_cause: Transaction log full. Not archived properly.
resolution: Truncated logs. Fixed archiving script. Added monitoring.

title: SQL Server deadlock loop
symptoms: Queries timing out. Transaction rollbacks.
root_cause: Two transactions locking each other. No deadlock resolution.
resolution: Added deadlock retry logic. Optimized query order. Added lock timeout.

title: MongoDB replica set election
symptoms: Write operations failing. Primary election in progress.
root_cause: Network partition caused primary step down.
resolution: Restored network connectivity. Forced primary election. Verified sync.

title: Service mesh sidecar injection failure
symptoms: New pods missing Istio sidecar. Service calls failing.
root_cause: Istio mutating webhook down. Sidecar injection disabled.
resolution: Restarted Istio control plane. Re-enabled injection. Restarted deployment.

title: Circuit breaker tripped
symptoms: Requests to users-service failing. Fallback activated.
root_cause: Users-service latency >5s. Circuit opened after 50% errors.
resolution: Circuit closed after recovery. Increased timeout to 10s. Added retry.

title: Distributed tracing broken
symptoms: No trace data in Jaeger. Zipkin collector down.
root_cause: Zipkin collector pod OOM killed. Memory limit too low.
resolution: Increased Zipkin memory limit to 1GB. Restarted. Verified traces.

title: GitHub Actions runner offline
symptoms: CI jobs stuck in queue. No runners available.
root_cause: Self-hosted runner VM crashed. Auto-recovery failed.
resolution: Restarted VM. Re-registered runner. Added health checks.

title: Docker image build failure
symptoms: Docker build failing. Cache issues. Dependency errors.
root_cause: Docker cache corrupted. Base image not available.
resolution: Cleared Docker cache. Updated base image. Rebuilt with --no-cache.
